theme_strategy.core_philosophy: Anti-AI Slop. Avoid generic centered layouts and standard 'SaaS gradients'. Use asymmetry, high contrast, and specific, meaningful imagery.

usage_rules: Use Orange (#f97316) for primary actions and key highlights only. Do not overuse.
Use 'Slate' scale for neutrals (cool greys) to maintain a tech feel.
Ensure all text on orange backgrounds is white or very dark for contrast.
Avoid gradients on text unless it's a very subtle shift.

layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for section vertical padding.
layout_strategies.alignment: Left-aligned headings for strength. Asymmetrical compositions.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-orange-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 hover:shadow-orange-500/40
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-sm p-8 hover:border-orange-200 transition-colors duration-300 group

strategies: Staggered entrance for list items (0.1s delay)

images.strategy: Professional, high-res, authentic. Avoid 3D abstract blobs unless they look engineered.

hero_bg.desc: Use as a subtle background element or texture overlay.

team_collaboration.desc: For About page or Home 'Trust' section.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic gradients or centered layouts without reason.
Use 'Space Grotesk' for all headings to give a distinctive tech identity.
Maintain strict 'slate' grayscale. Do not mix cool and warm grays.
Buttons must have a 'tactile' feel - slightly sharp corners, subtle shadows.
Interactive elements must have clear :hover and :focus states (use orange ring for focus).
Use 'Bento Grid' layouts for feature lists instead of simple rows.
Ensure text contrast is AA compliant (4.5:1) - minimal grey text on white.
For icons, use Lucide-React but style them with stroke-width={1.5} for elegance.
instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include the new fonts and colors.
Import the Google Fonts in index.css.
Create a reusable 'Section' component that handles the max-width and padding consistently.
Implement the 'Navbar' with a glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80).
